description: Add 'Explore This Neighborhood' CTA widgets to existing calculator pages and add Google Maps Embed iframe to solar-roi city pages.
steps: Create a reusable components/features/NeighborhoodCTA.tsx component - a compact card with: heading 'Know Your Neighborhood Before You Move', brief description, MapPin icon from lucide-react, a link/button pointing to /neighborhood-explorer, styled with emerald gradient similar to the CTA in app/solar-roi/[city]/page.tsx (the 'Want Data for YOUR Exact Roof?' CTA pattern). Include a Badge with text 'NEW'.

Add the NeighborhoodCTA component to app/rent-vs-buy-calculator/page.tsx - place it after the main calculator content (after the RentVsBuyCalculator component and the prose section, before any existing RelatedCalculators).
Add the NeighborhoodCTA component to app/home-loan-calculator/page.tsx - place it after the main HomeLoanCalculator component section.
Add the NeighborhoodCTA component to app/moving-cost-calculator/page.tsx - place it after the main MovingCostCalculator component section.

Add a Google Maps Embed iframe to app/solar-roi/[city]/page.tsx - in the sidebar (right column, within the sticky div), add a Card containing an iframe with src='https://www.google.com/maps/embed/v1/place?key=NEXT_PUBLIC_KEY&q=CITY_NAME'. Use the city.city_name from the city data. Place it after the existing 'Local Solar Stats' card. Wrap with appropriate heading like 'Location Map'.
acceptance_criteria: components/features/NeighborhoodCTA.tsx exists as a reusable component
app/solar-roi/[city]/page.tsx includes a Google Maps Embed iframe using the city name
npx tsc --noEmit passes without type errors
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to confirm no type errors
Run npm run build to confirm the build succeeds
